blocks.text: Match preview: Yorkshire face Warwickshire in 32nd Match (TEST) on Fri, 12 Jun, 2026, 3:30 pm at North Marine Road Ground Scarborough. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard TEST surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 300–400 runs per innings typical.
Light drizzle · High 20°C / Low 14°C · Rain: 0.2 mm · Wind: up to 32 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
